FArmoury.applySlashing.EnableHint: If enabled, successful hits with Slashing weapon on part protected by no more than 1 AP will automatically add Bleeding Condition
FArmoury.arrowReclamation.EnableHint: Enable ammo reclamation upon range weapon test roll. When used during an encounter some projectiles will be returned after encounter ends.
FArmoury.arrowReclamation.RuleHint: Select rules by which decide if arrow can be reused. Word `critical` means both criticals and fumbles on the main Ranged Test roll.
FArmoury.arrowReclamation.SuccessRule: Ranged Attack rolled even and was successful
FArmoury.arrowReclamation.NoCritRule: Ranged Attack rolled even, but not critical
FArmoury.arrowReclamation.SuccessNoCritR: Ranged Attack rolled even, was successful, but not critical
FArmoury.arrowReclamation.FailureRule: Ranged Attack rolled even and failed
FArmoury.arrowReclamation.FailureNoCritR: Ranged Attack rolled even, has failed, but not critical
FArmoury.arrowReclamation.PercentageNoCr: Separate roll using Percentage, without criticals
FArmoury.arrowReclamation.PercentageHint: Set target percentage for rolling with certain Rules. Roll will succeed if d100 rolls less or equal to Target
FArmoury.SlashingApplied:
{hitLocation} Hit Location is protected by no more than 1 AP, applying Bleed condition.
{bleedAmtOld} -> {bleedAmt}
FArmoury.Chat.ArrowsRecovered: {0} found and recovered {2} {1}s that can be reused.
WFRP4E.Properties.Slashing: A  Slashing  weapon  inflicts  one  Bleeding  Condition  on successful hits on locations protected by no more than 1 Armour Point.
WFRP4E.Properties.Recoverable:
Projectile can be recovered even if it's ammunition group normally cannot.
(requires feature enabled in settings)
WFRP4E.Properties.Unrecoverable: Projectile always perishes and can never be recovered.
WFRP4E.Properties.Sturdy:
Projectile is sturdy and easier to recover.
Percentage rules: rolls double, picks lower
Success/Fail rules: negates success/failure condition
Other rules: if not recovered, roll for Percentage.
(requires feature enabled in settings)
WFRP4E.Properties.Frail:
Projectile is very frail and easily breaks making it harder to recover.
Percentage rules: rolls double, picks higher
Other rules: if not recovered, roll for Percentage
(requires feature enabled in settings)
